allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('version','?'\)\); deps = {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in ['next','react','shadcn','tailwind','zod','hook-form']\)]")

Bash(node --import=tsx/esm --env-file=.env -e "import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client'; import { PrismaPg } from '@prisma/adapter-pg'; const a = new PrismaPg\({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL }\); const p = new PrismaClient\({ adapter: a }\); const u = await p.user.findMany\({ select: { email: true, role: true, cooperativeId: true } }\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(u, null, 2\)\); const acc = await p.account.findMany\(\); console.log\('accounts with pwd:', acc.filter\(x => x.password\).length\);")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Mavi\\AppData\\Local\\npm-cache\\_logs\\" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { Get-Content $_.FullName | Select-Object -Last 30 })
Bash(node -e "const z = require\('./node_modules/zod'\); const s = z.object\({name: z.string\(\)}\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(s._def, null, 2\).slice\(0, 300\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); console.log\('_zod:', JSON.stringify\(z.z?._zod ?? z._zod ?? 'none'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); const s = z.object\({n: z.string\(\)}\); console.log\('typeName:', s._def.typeName, '_zod:', JSON.stringify\(s._zod?.version\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./node_modules/zod/package.json'\); console.log\('types:', pkg.types, 'exports:', JSON.stringify\(pkg.exports?.['.']?.types ?? pkg.exports?.['.']?.import?.types\)\)")
